def find_rows(patterns, source_types=None, n=5):
    mask = pd.Series(True, index=df.index)
    if source_types:
        mask &= df['source_type'].isin(source_types)
    txt = (df['verbatim'].fillna('') + ' ' + df['context'].fillna('')).str.lower()
    m = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)
    for pat in patterns:
        m |= txt.str.contains(pat, regex=True)
    res = df[mask & m].copy()
    return res, res.head(n)[['evidence_id','source_type','source_url','verbatim']]

def pick_top_quotes(sub, keywords, n=5):
    sub = sub.copy()
    sub['score']=sub.apply(lambda r: score_row(r, keywords), axis=1)
    sub=sub.sort_values('score', ascending=False)
    # ensure unique verbatim maybe
    quotes=[]
    seen=set()
    for _,r in sub.iterrows():
        q=str(r['verbatim']).strip()
        if not q or q in seen: 
            continue
        seen.add(q)
        quotes.append((r['evidence_id'], q[:320], float(round(r['score'],2))))
        if len(quotes)>=n: break
    return quotes, sub

def count_habitats(sub):
    return sub['habitat_type'].nunique()

def velocity_status(sub):
    dated=sub.dropna(subset=['dt'])
    if len(dated)<5:
        return 'STEADY'
    cutoff=datetime(2025,3,3,tzinfo=timezone.utc)
    recent=(dated['dt']>=cutoff).sum()
    old=(dated['dt']<cutoff).sum()
    if old==0 and recent>0: 
        return 'ACCELERATING'
    ratio=recent/(old+1e-9)
    if ratio>=1.2: return 'ACCELERATING'
    if ratio<=0.8: return 'DECELERATING'
    return 'STEADY'

def triangulation_status(sub):
    n= count_habitats(sub)
    if n<=1: return 'SINGLE'
    if n==2: return 'DUAL'
    return 'MULTI'

def contradiction_count(sub, patterns):
    if not patterns: return 0
    txt=sub['verbatim'].fillna('').str.lower()
    m=pd.Series(False,index=sub.index)
    for pat in patterns:
        m |= txt.str.contains(pat, regex=True)
    return int(m.sum())

def pick_ids(sub, patterns, k=2):
    txt=sub['verbatim'].fillna('').str.lower()
    m=pd.Series(False,index=sub.index)
    for pat in patterns:
        m |= txt.str.contains(pat, regex=True)
    ids=sub[m]['evidence_id'].tolist()
    if len(ids)<k:
        # fallback to top scoring items
        ids=sub['evidence_id'].tolist()
    return ids[:k]

def truncate(s, n=280):
    s=str(s)
    return s if len(s)<=n else s[:n-1]

candidates=[]
for i,(aid,spec) in enumerate(angle_specs.items(), start=1):
    sub=clusters[spec['cluster']]
    quotes, scored = pick_top_quotes(sub, spec['keywords'], n=5)
    who_ids=pick_ids(scored, spec['who_pats'], k=2)
    trig_ids=pick_ids(scored, spec['trig_pats'], k=2)
    # pain ids: top 2 quotes ids
    pain_ids=[q[0] for q in quotes[:2]]
    belief_before_id=quotes[0][0] if quotes else (scored['evidence_id'].iloc[0] if len(scored)>0 else '')
    belief_after_id=quotes[1][0] if len(quotes)>1 else belief_before_id
    
    def ids_str(ids):
        return ",".join(ids[:3])
    who = truncate(f"{spec['name']} segment: {ids_str(who_ids)}", 280)
    trigger = truncate(f"Why now: {ids_str(trig_ids)}", 280)
    pain_desire = truncate(f"Pain/Outcome/Enemy/Failed fixes: see {ids_str(pain_ids)}", 280)
    # mechanism: use product brief
    mech = truncate("Mechanism: customizable, safety-first lookup; quick remedy cards + contraindication & herb–drug/pregnancy notes; escalations/when-to-seek-care; 'honest' evidence grading.",280)
    belief_before=truncate(f"Before: 'I’m unsure what’s safe / what to do' ({belief_before_id})",280)
    belief_after=truncate(f"After: 'I can choose a safe next step & know when to escalate' ({belief_after_id})",280)
    contradiction=contradiction_count(scored, spec['contradict'])
    cand={
        "angle_id":aid,
        "angle_name":spec['name'],
        "definition":{
            "who":who,
            "pain_desire":pain_desire,
            "mechanism_why":mech,
            "belief_shift":{"before":belief_before,"after":belief_after},
            "trigger":trigger
        },
        "evidence":{
            "supporting_voc_count":int(len(sub)),
            "top_quotes":[{"voc_id":qid,"quote":qt,"adjusted_score":sc} for qid,qt,sc in quotes],
            "triangulation_status":triangulation_status(sub),
            "velocity_status":velocity_status(sub),
            "contradiction_count":contradiction
        },
        "hook_starters":[
            {"visual":truncate("Screenshot of a cluttered medicine cabinet + herbal tea tin",280),
             "opening_line":truncate("If 'natural' feels safer but you’re scared to make the wrong call…",280),
             "lever":truncate("Risk-management: safe next step + red flags",280)},
            {"visual":truncate("Close-up: checklist page with 'contraindications' highlighted",280),
             "opening_line":truncate("Stop guessing—use a 60‑second safety check before you try any remedy.",280),
             "lever":truncate("Confidence via rules + lookup",280)},
            {"visual":truncate("Sticky note: 'What do I do tonight?' on fridge",280),
             "opening_line":truncate("When it’s 2am and you just need a sane plan…",280),
             "lever":truncate("Night-of trigger + fast lookup",280)},
        ]
    }
    candidates.append(cand)

def show_top(sub, keywords, n=8):
    quotes, scored = pick_top_quotes(sub, keywords, n=n)
    return quotes

    print(show_top(clusters[spec['cluster']], spec['keywords'], n=6))
    print()

def make_candidate(aid, spec, mech_text, who_text, trig_text, pain_text, before_text, after_text, contradictions_patterns):
    sub=clusters[spec['cluster']]
    quotes,_=pick_top_quotes(sub, spec['keywords'], n=5)
    # compute contradiction
    scored=sub.copy()
    contradiction=contradiction_count(scored, contradictions_patterns)
    cand={
        "angle_id":aid,
        "angle_name":spec['name'],
        "definition":{
            "who":truncate(who_text,280),
            "pain_desire":truncate(pain_text,280),
            "mechanism_why":truncate(mech_text,280),
            "belief_shift":{"before":truncate(before_text,280),"after":truncate(after_text,280)},
            "trigger":truncate(trig_text,280)
        },
        "evidence":{
            "supporting_voc_count":int(len(sub)),
            "top_quotes":[{"voc_id":qid,"quote":qt[:320],"adjusted_score":float(sc)} for qid,qt,sc in quotes],
            "triangulation_status":triangulation_status(sub),
            "velocity_status":velocity_status(sub),
            "contradiction_count":int(contradiction)
        },
        "hook_starters":[
            {"visual":truncate("Checklist page: 'safe', 'avoid', 'ask a professional' boxes",280),
             "opening_line":truncate("You don’t need more remedies—you need a decision ladder.",280),
             "lever":truncate("Clarity under uncertainty",280)},
            {"visual":truncate("Split screen: Google results contradicting each other",280),
             "opening_line":truncate("One site says 'safe'… the next says 'never'—so what now?",280),
             "lever":truncate("Stops endless searching",280)},
            {"visual":truncate("Highlighter marking 'contraindications' and 'drug interactions'",280),
             "opening_line":truncate("Before you try any herb, run the 3-check safety scan.",280),
             "lever":truncate("Risk reduction + confidence",280)},
        ]
    }
    return cand
